title: Crimson Reds
description: Create bold, bright red lips with a palette for the creative type, with three shades that you can blend as you like!
ingredients: Citrullus Lanatus Seed Oil (Kalahari Melon Oil)
Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)
Ricinus Communis Seed Oil (Organic Castor Oil)
Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Peel Cera (Orange Peel Wax)

images.alt: A square, two-toned block of "Crimson Reds" Lipstrick Square with opaque black and vibrant red sections. The red side features a raised circular, gear-like texture.

A person with dark hair, wearing a green top and a septum ring, smiles with deep crimson red lips (consistent with the "Crimson Reds" Lipstrick Square). They rest their chin on their hands against a bright magenta background.

A person with dark hair, wearing a chartreuse green top and a septum ring, smiles directly at the camera. They wear a deep crimson red lip color consistent with the "Crimson Reds" Lipstrick Square, against a bright magenta background.

Three forearms with various complexions are shown on a light grey background. Each has three vertical swatches of Lush Lip square swatches: black, deep crimson red, and a vibrant orange/magenta/red-orange.
